texto: Did you know that in 2009, more chemicals caused by chemicals than motor vehicle accidents? Are you surprised? This is the real fact according to the Center for Disease Control and Preventon (Centers for Disease Control and Prevention). This is the reality we face today
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Brett West que provoca temas ligados a tempo. Ao questionar “Did you know that in 2009, more chemicals caused by chemicals than motor vehicle accidents? Are y…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre tempo, herbal-medicine, science, com foco em science e tahitian-noni.
